data.title: SEMIFIVE expands with new subsidiary in Japan for AI chip design projects, enhancing global presence.
data.description: Expanding its proficiency in high-performance custom chip design for AI and HPC, SEMIFIVE has recently launched a subsidiary in Japan to fortify its worldwide presence. The company, headquartered in Seoul, South Korea, made this strategic move on December 11, 2025. SEMIFIVE is known for its expertise in creating custom AI semiconductors, specifically ASICs, and aims to enhance its global reach through this expansion.

data.title: BMTC GROUP INC. reports $24,405,000 revenue increase to $474,724,000 for Oct 31, 2025 period. Net earnings drop to $14,313,000 from $29,419,000 in 2024.
data.description: The company's revenues for the nine-month period ending October 31, 2025, increased by $24,405,000 to $474,724,000 compared to $450,319,000 for the same period in 2024, reflecting a 5.4% growth. The growth was mainly driven by a 6.2% revenue increase in the commercial sector from the Tanguay division, while the real estate division saw a 95.9% decrease in investment property revenue. Net earnings for the period were $14,313,000, down from $29,419,000 in 2024. The company completed the disposal of an asset generating a gain of $2,765,000. The Tanguay division contributed a net profit of $24,399,000. Operational improvements and restructuring initiatives helped mitigate the impact of severance costs and outsourcing decisions. Adjusted net earnings for the period amounted to $14,313,000, showing a decrease when compared to the same period in 2024. Additionally, the company made significant changes to its distribution and warehousing operations in the Greater Montréal area during the period.

data.title: Miami International Holdings priced secondary public offering of common stock on Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: A tech-driven leader in regulated financial markets across various asset classes, Miami International Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: MIAX), based in Princeton, N.J. and Miami, disclosed the pricing of a secondary offering on Dec. 11, 2025.

data.title: NAIC officers elected during 2025 Fall National Meeting to serve in 2026. President: Virginia, Vice President: Arizona.
data.description: In Hollywood, Florida on December 11, 2025, the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC) concluded its 2025 Fall National Meeting. At this event, the members of NAIC elected new chief state insurance regulators to serve as officers in 2026. Virginia was elected as the new President.
